hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eiq '(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+commit([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commits are reserved for the user \u2014 Claude must not run git commit in this repo. Ask the user to run it themselves."}}'; fi
